positive: An elegant, minimalist line art illustration featuring a collection of highly stylized woodland creatures (fox, owl, deer, rabbits) engaged in subtle, whimsical interactions. The composition should be vertically balanced, using varying line weights and clean silhouettes against negative space. Incorporate botanical elements like delicate ferns, stylized mushrooms, and winding vines to connect the subjects. The overall style should evoke a whimsical, Scandinavian folk-art aesthetic, rendered in monochrome ink (black line on white background) with touches of muted sage green and burnt umber color accents. The design must be scalable, high-contrast, and perfect for central apparel printing.
negative: blurry, low contrast, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, noise, jpeg artifacts, disfigured, photorealistic
